channel.title: 9front Systems — recent CVEs
channel.description: Most recent CVEs assigned by 9front Systems (9front).

item.title: CVE-2026-9054 · 9.2 CRITICAL 🌩️ — Invalid IP packets cause a kernel panic
item.description: An attacker sending tcp, il, rudp, rudp, or gre packets with a length less than the header size would trigger a kernel panic.

item.title: CVE-2026-9053 · 6.9 MEDIUM 🌩️
item.description: Mothra would respect a default value given by a website for HTML file upload forms. An attacker could craft a website with a malicious default file path, and then conceal this form element.

item.title: CVE-2024-8158 · 8.8 HIGH — User impersonation for lib9p based 9p fileservers
item.description: A bug in the 9p authentication implementation within lib9p allows an attacker with an existing valid user within the configured auth server to impersonate any other valid filesystem user. This is due to lib9p not properly verifying that the uname giv…
